name: CISA Cybersecurity Performance Goals
description: CISA Cybersecurity Performance Goals — voluntary cross-sector cybersecurity practices designed to be a baseline for critical infrastructure. Mapped to NIST CSF.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
